content:
OK, so unisson mode: 4, detune 38, pan spread from mid to full...

Chorus: Rate 9; Delay 12; Feedback +40; Shape Triangle; Mix 9 'o clock, Intensity Half (more or less, see what you like best, of course)...

Punch Intensity: if you want it smooth, bring it down...

Amp envelope, some attack, like middle or so, no decay, full sustain, some release..
__________________________________________________

simple square/saw-ish waveforms. a little volume attack. low pass filter with a tad of resonance at around 3500hz. a little bit of noise. a tight reverb. you can get pretty close with those in mind... good luck!
